parsed.production_notes: The video exhibits clear signs of AI generation, including distorted and morphing faces in the audience. The man on stage is unnaturally frozen, and the boy's lip movements are completely disconnected from the audio track.

characters.appearance: Young boy, approximately 10-12 years old, slim build, brown complexion, short black hair. He has a clean-shaven, youthful face.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeved button-up shirt, blue and red striped tie, and dark blue trousers.
characters.demeanor: Confident, expressive, and frequently gesturing with his hands.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged man, medium build, brown complexion, short black hair, and a mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue suit jacket, light blue shirt, and a dark tie.
characters.demeanor: Static, smiling, and occasionally clapping in a looped manner.

scenes.setting: Auditorium stage and seating area, bright even lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young boy stands at a wooden podium, speaking into a microphone. A man in a dark suit stands to his right, smiling. Behind them is a large projection screen displaying a close-up of the boy. The stage is brightly lit.

A wide shot of a large auditorium filled with an audience seated in red chairs. The audience includes men and women, many wearing traditional Indian attire like sarees. Some individuals are holding notebooks and pens, looking forward attentively.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout. The top half shows a boy giving a speech at a podium with a man standing nearby and a large projection screen behind them. The bottom half shows a large, seated audience watching the stage.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: जो आज से ही डेली इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करेगा ना, वो BMW में घूमेगा। [Whoever practices English daily from today, will roam in a BMW.]
Character A says: और जो नहीं करेगा, वो टेम्पो चलाएगा। [And whoever doesn't, will drive a tempo.]
Character A says: अब तुम लोग बोलोगे कि रोज़ इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करनी है, तो भाई हमें तो ऑनलाइन कोर्स करना पड़ेगा, कोई डिग्री लेनी पड़ेगी। [Now you guys will say that to practice English daily, brother we will have to do an online course, get some degree.]
Character A says: हमारा बहुत पैसा लग जाएगा, घर में इतना पैसा नहीं है। [It will cost us a lot of money, there isn't that much money at home.]
Character A says: भाई, हम जो तरीका बताने वाले हैं ना, उसमें इतना पैसा नहीं लगेगा। [Brother, the method we are going to tell you, won't cost that much money.]
Character A says: तुमको सिर्फ एक काम करना है, डाउनलोड करनी है इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप। [You just have to do one thing, download the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: अब बोलोगे, ये इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप क्या है भाई? [Now you'll say, what is this English Seekho app brother?]
Character A says: इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप पर इंग्लिश सिखाने के लिए एक AI कोच है। [There is an AI coach on the English Seekho app to teach English.]
Character A says: तुम लोगों को भाई पहले इंग्लिश के वर्ड सीखने हैं, कि भाई यस सीखना है, नो सीखना है। [You guys brother first have to learn English words, like brother learn yes, learn no.]
Character A says: आई क्या होता है, एम क्या होता है, वाज़ वर क्या होता है। [What is I, what is am, what is was were.]
Character A says: उसके बाद सेंटेंस बनाना सीखना है, आई एम गोइंग टू द मार्केट। [After that learn to make sentences, I am going to the market.]
Character A says: फिर उससे बड़ा सेंटेंस बनाना सीखना है, टुडे आई एम गोइंग टू द मार्केट टू बाय वेजिटेबल्स। [Then learn to make a bigger sentence than that, today I am going to the market to buy vegetables.]
Character A says: सब कुछ इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप पर तुम लोग सीख जाओगे। [You guys will learn everything on the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: करना क्या है? ये जो फोन पे टिप-टिप करते रहते हो ना, रील्स देख रहे हो। [What to do? This tip-tip you keep doing on the phone, watching reels.]
Character A says: हंस रहे हो, लाइक मार रहे हो, शेयर मार रहे हो, ये सब बंद करो। [Laughing, hitting like, hitting share, stop all this.]
Character A says: इंस्टाग्राम फोन से डिलीट करो, इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप को डाउनलोड करो। [Delete Instagram from phone, download English Seekho app.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट दो, एक महीने में तुम सबकी इंग्लिश विराट जैसी हो जाएगी, ठीक है? [Give only 15 minutes daily, in one month everyone's English will become like Virat's, okay?]
Character A says: इंग्लिश अगर सीखनी है ना भाई, तो रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करनी पड़ेगी। [If you want to learn English brother, then you will have to practice daily.]
Character A says: और उसका रामबाण तरीका है, इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप। [And its panacea method is, English Seekho app.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A black smartphone is positioned vertically in the center against a solid white background. The phone screen is dark.

scenes.visual_description: A smartphone is displayed on a white background. The phone screen shows a colorful app logo, and a green install button is positioned below the phone.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.visual_description: A solid black screen displaying a long paragraph of white disclaimer text.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf s representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
